NAVAREA XIX 88/17
NORWEGIAN SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY 09 AUG TO 31 AUG
WG AMUNDSEN TOWING 12 X 6000 METRE LONG CABLES WITHIN AREA BOUND BY:

A.64-30.00N 007-54.00E
B.66-43.00N 010-56.00E
C.67-06.00N 009-27.50E
D.66-37.00N 004-44.00E
E.65-50.00N 004-44.00E
F.65-41.00N 006-04.00E

REQUESTING 6 MILE BERTH ASTERN AND 3 MILE BERTH AHEAD AND ABEAM.
